free_text: Vibrational states in even wolfram nuclei
Targets of the four even isotopes 180W, l82W, 184W
and 186W (approx. 50 mu-g/cm2) were prepared by direct
deposition with an isotope separator on approx.
50 mu-g/cm2 carbon foils. The isotopic enrichment
achieved was > 95% except for the 180W target which
was 65% enriched.
The data were recorded in a magnetic
spectrograph.
Tables from the article
scale error
SD
data on p.274
Natural target
The uncertainties on the absolute cross
sections are of the order of 20% except where larger
errors are given in the tables. The major
contributions to the experimental uncertainties arise
from the normalization procedure(approx. 10%), from
trackcounting reproducibility (approx. 10%),
and from statistics.
